title: Clinical response of tuberculosis patients, a prospective cohort study.
author: Feleke BE Alene GD Feleke TE Motebaynore Y Biadglegne F
content: S-EPMC5749762 PMC5749762 Clinical response of tuberculosis patients, a prospective cohort study. Clinical response means a response to drug intake that can be detected and appreciated by a change in signs and symptoms. The objectives of this study were to assess time to clinical response
